title: Blue Printed Cotton Short Top
description:
Upgrade your wardrobe with this Trenzura blue printed cotton short top, designed for effortless style and comfort. Featuring a round neck with designer knot tie-up and elegant bell sleeves, this trendy short top is perfect for office wear, daily wear, and summer outings. Its breathable cotton fabric and eye-catching print make it a must-have stylish women top. 

Fabric, Colour & Care 
Fabric: 100% Cotton (Soft, breathable & skin-friendly)

Machine wash cold 
Wash with similar colors 
Do not bleach 
Iron at low temperature
